title: Saving Files
drDigitalIntro: When you make something on a computer — a note, a letter, a drawing — it disappears when you close the app unless you SAVE it. Saving keeps a copy as a file. When you save, you give the file a name and choose which folder to keep it in. Let's save a note.

playgroundTask.goal: Save your note into a folder

steps.say: You typed a note. Follow the yellow highlights: press Save, type the name shopping-list, choose the Documents folder, then press Save.

drDigitalSuccess: You saved your note as shopping-list in the Documents folder. Now you can find it again any time!
drDigitalHint: Do it in order: click the glowing Save button, type shopping-list, click Documents, then click Save.
